name: patina/tests
description: PHPUnit tests for the Patina PHP extension

ignore.PKSA-z3gr-8qht-p93v: PHPT code-coverage deserialization; we don't use PHPT tests. Drop when a patched phpunit 10.x/11.x is released.
ignore.PKSA-5jz8-6tcw-pbk4: INI-value argument injection in child processes; not exploitable by our test runner. Drop when a patched phpunit 10.x/11.x is released.
